creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2009-07-12 22:14:27 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    x11-clocks           Makefile 
  Added files:
    x11-clocks/plasma-applet-geekclock Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  Geek Clock is a plasma applet for KDE4 that displays an analog clock. Instead
  of regular numerals, it display equivalent notations based on mathematics,
  physics, and computer science.
  
  WWW: http://www.kde-look.org/content/show.php?content=107807
  
  PR:             ports/136633
  Submitted by:   Jason E. Hale <bsdkaffee at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.65      +1 -0      ports/x11-clocks/Makefile
  1.1       +29 -0     ports/x11-clocks/plasma-applet-geekclock/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/x11-clocks/plasma-applet-geekclock/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/x11-clocks/plasma-applet-geekclock/pkg-descr (new)
